name: List Projection
query:
CALL gds.graph.list()
YIELD graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount, schema
RETURN graphName, nodeCount, relationshipCount, schema.nodes AS NodeLabels, schema.relationships AS RelTypes

name: Projection All
Projection Penyakit-Gejala
Projection Penyakit-Treatment
Projection Penyakit-Kategori
Projection Penyakit-Obat
Projection Obat-Gejala
Centrality All
query:
CALL gds.betweenness.stream('medicalGraph')
YIELD nodeId, score
WITH gds.util.asNode(nodeId) AS n, score
RETURN 
    labels(n)[0] AS Label,
    coalesce(n.`Property 1`, n.obatLabel, n.kategoriLabel) AS Nama,
    score
ORDER BY score DESC

name: Centrality Penyakit-All
query:
CALL gds.betweenness.stream('medicalGraph')
YIELD nodeId, score
WITH gds.util.asNode(nodeId) AS n, score
WHERE n:Penyakit 
RETURN n.`Property 1` AS Nama_Penyakit, score
ORDER BY score DESC

name: Kemiripan antar penyakit berdasarkan keseluruhan model (Tanpa Duplikasi Terbalik)
query:
// Kemiripan antar penyakit berdasarkan keseluruhan model (Tanpa Duplikasi Terbalik)
CALL gds.nodeSimilarity.stream('medicalGraph')
YIELD node1, node2, similarity
WITH gds.util.asNode(node1) AS n1, gds.util.asNode(node2) AS n2, similarity
WHERE n1:Penyakit AND n2:Penyakit 
  AND elementId(n1) < elementId(n2) // Filter krusial: memastikan tiap pasangan unik hanya muncul sekali
RETURN 
    n1.`Property 1` AS Penyakit_A, 
    n2.`Property 1` AS Penyakit_B, 
    similarity
ORDER BY similarity DESC

name: Community Penyakit-All
query:
CALL gds.louvain.stream('medicalGraph')
YIELD nodeId, communityId
WITH gds.util.asNode(nodeId) AS n, communityId
WHERE n:Penyakit // Kita fokus melihat pengelompokan penyakitnya
RETURN 
    communityId, 
    collect(n.`Property 1`) AS Daftar_Penyakit,
    count(n) AS Jumlah_Penyakit
ORDER BY Jumlah_Penyakit DESC
